sample_size.source_quote: 1604 patients were screened for sepsis, of which 294 were diagnosed with sepsis.

sofa_score_baseline.source_quote: SOFA score on day 1, median (Q1, Q3) 10 (7-12)

icu_mortality_percent.source_quote: the overall mortality due to sepsis and septic shock in the ICU during the observation period was 57.5%.

mortality_predictors.outcome_definition: In-hospital mortality in patients with sepsis
mortality_predictors.confounders_adjusted: lowest blood phosphorus, highest lactate, 24-h APACHE-II score, lung infection
mortality_predictors.source_quote: central nervous system dysfunction (odds ratio [OR]=2.59, 95% confidence interval [CI]: 1.15-5.84, P=0.022)
